description:
Operating Area: Greece

COSMOS is a 24.81m / 81ft Gulet Superyacht built in 1979 and later underwent a refit in 2023. Sleeping 8 guests in 4 cabins and with a crew of 4. Cruising at 8.00 kn/ph with a top speed of 12.00 kn/ph. The guest cabins comprise of 2 cabins with a queen size bed and en-suite bathroom facilities, a cabin with a double bed and en-suite bathroom facilities, and a cabin with a twin bed and en-suite bathroom facilities.

blueprint.name: COSMOS

amenities.label: Smart TV in salon and in every cabin with Netflix
Individually controlled TVs and external slots for HDMI, USB, Line-in
Soundsystem throughout the yacht and in each cabin

toys.label: Board games and puzzles for kids

entertainment: Smart TV in salon and in every cabin with Netflix
Individually controlled TVs and external slots for HDMI, USB, Line-in
Soundsystem throughout the yacht and in each cabin

crew.name: Giannis Muskaj
crew.bio:
At the young age of 29, Captain Giannis is well-equipped to take command of M/S Cosmos. His journey on the open sea began early, as he set sail at the age of 20 and has been a dedicated sailor ever since.
With years of experience navigating the waters, he has honed his sailing skills, becoming intimately acquainted with the sea's rhythms and nuances. But his connection to the maritime world goes even deeper. Giannis joined our team 5 years ago participating in the technical maintenance of our full fleet which helped him to obtain wider knowledge of the operation and service of yachts.
Captain Giannis embodies the perfect blend of hands-on sailing experience, technical acumen, and an enduring love for the sea. He is prepared to lead the way, ensuring a safe and memorable journey for all who step aboard and always there to accommodate all our client's need.

crew.name: Ilias Marinellis
crew.bio:
Captain Ilias is our veteran and definitely the perfect addition to our small and enthusiastic team. With his great experience and sea wolf aura he will always be there to assist you in your daily sea endeavors and ensure that every small detail is in place.
Being an officer on yachts up to 70m long for more than 30 years and having sailed in Greece for almost all his life, he will ensure that you will always sail in comfort, with ease and safety.
He will assist you with all your water sports or fishing and snorkeling, and he will keep the yacht spick and span clean.

crew.name: Blerina Muskaj
crew.bio:
Blerina is an enthusiastic, experienced, hardworking professional with a vast experience in working on luxury yachts in Greece and the Seychelles. She is probably the most valuable member of our Crew, as she makes herself always available for the guests, always smiling and full of energy, always ready to help.
She speaks English, Albanian and Greek, and with some knowledge of Russian and Italian, she is an excellent hostess, ready to assist in planning your day, or just fixing your suitcase, packing, unpacking for you, preparing your cabin or your late afternoon cocktail hour.
She is organized and meticulous providing a nice warm environment, in which you feel at home.

crew.name: Levis Kodhimaj
crew.bio:
Levis Kodhimaj is the dedicated chef aboard bringing with him 13 years of culinary expertise. A graduate of the Institute of Anavissos in Culinary Arts, Levis has honed his skills in various high-profile kitchens across Greece. Known for his innovative approach and high standards, Levis excels in menu planning, food presentation, and kitchen management. His commitment to quality and creativity ensures exceptional dining experiences for all on board.
Clients can anticipate a bespoke dining experience curated by him, showcasing the richness of Greek cuisine and tailored to their preferences and desires. From traditional Greek dishes to innovative twists on classic flavours, our Chef's commitment to culinary excellence, using fresh and locally-sourced ingredients, ensures that each meal is a masterpiece. Chef Levis Kodhimaj promises to deliver an unforgettable voyage of Greek flavors aboard of M/S Cosmos
